L’établissement Dali Ancient Town-Jinbi Yayuan Inn assure un service de location de vélos et un service de location de voitures.

Vous séjournerez à proximité de ces lieux d’intérêt : Porte Erhai, Jiang Gong Ci et Wuhua Building. L'aéroport le plus proche (Aéroport de Dali Fengyi) est à 30 km.

As comodidades deste alojamento incluem serviço de quartos e uma receção aberta 24 horas, assim como acesso Wi-Fi gratuito em toda a propriedade. Os hóspedes podem desfrutar de uma bebida no bar.

No alojamento, cada quarto tem varanda com vista do jardim. A casa de banho privativa dispõe de chuveiro, produtos de higiene pessoal gratuitos e um secador de cabelo. No alojamento, os quartos incluem roupa de cama e toalhas.

São oferecidas opções de pequeno-almoço buffet, à carta e asiático.
hotels.description_it:

Presso questo hotel, ogni camera dispone di un balcone con vista sul giardino. Il bagno privato prevede doccia, set di cortesia e asciugacapelli. Presso Dunhuang Likerman Hotel, le camere includono lenzuola e asciugamani.

La colazione è disponibile e include opzioni a buffet, à la carte e asiatiche.

hotels.name: Dunhuang County Posthouse

Il est installé à respectivement 1,1 km, 1,5 km et 1,7 km de : Dunhuang Longquan Villa, Dunhuang Historical Exhibition Park et Mingsha Mountain and Crescent Moon Spring. Le personnel de la réception parle anglais et chinois.

Vous séjournerez à respectivement 1,4 km et 1,6 km de ces lieux d’intérêt : Dunhuang Minsu Museum et Leiyin Temple. L'aéroport le plus proche (Aéroport international de Dunhuang Mogao) est à 33 km.

hotels.name: Estuary Lodge Motel
hotels.description_fr:
Estuary Lodge Motel is located in the quiet village of Talsarnau, in Snowdonia national park, within 5 miles of the coast. The property is conveniently located for guests visiting Mount Snowdon, Portmeirion, the Ffestiniog steam railway and Llechwedd slate caverns for world famous zip rides.

The Estuary Lodge has 8 en suite rooms, all of which are located on the ground floor. Rooms are individually decorated with luxurious fabrics and natural colours, and each has a flat-screen TV, work desk and tea/coffee facilities.

The Motel is ideally located for exploring Snowdonia’s mountains and coast, and the staff are happy to advise on attractions and walks in the local areas. The nearest shops are less than 2 miles away.

Featuring air conditioning, the luxurious rooms and suites are fitted with carpeted floors, dressing room, minibar and refrigerator. Extras feature free bottled water and welcome fruits. The private bathroom comes with bath and shower facilities, free toiletries and a hairdryer.

hotels.name: Grand View Resort Beitou
hotels.description_fr:
5-star hotel in Beitou District, Grand View Resort is located in Beitou’s hot springs area, less than 10 minutes’ drive from both XinBeitou and Beitou Metro Stations. Uniquely designed by renowned architect Li Zuyuan (designer of Taipei 101), this resort features natural touches and classic tones, such as timber-framed interiors and natural cypress trees surrounded. It offers an outdoor pool and a spa.
The Thermal Valley is 800 metres away. It takes 40 minutes by MRT from Taipei 101.
Guests can laze in the hot spring, or exercise at the fitness centre to start the day. Resort facilities include a 24-hour front desk. Concierge and laundry services are available.
Equipped with air conditioning, rooms feature a private balcony with a sitting area.
